channel.title: Cambridgeshire on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Cambridgeshire on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Megatron: The UFO-Shaped Restaurant
item.description:
The Megatron was a flying saucer-designed building in Cambridgeshire, UK, constructed in 1990 as a restaurant. It was conceived by local businessman Danny Blundell and designed by Graham Campbell, featuring innovations like touchscreen ordering. Upon opening, locals mistook it for a UFO, prompting police investigation. The restaurant closed in 1992 due to high costs and was later taken over by McDonald’s, before ultimately being demolished in 2008.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Megatron_%28building%29
